attempt.claim:
theorem erdos_154_sumset :
    ∀ (m : ℕ) (_hm : 2 ≤ m) (N : ℕ → ℕ) (A : ℕ → Finset ℕ),
      Tendsto (fun k => (N k : ℝ)) atTop atTop →
      (∀ k, ∀ x ∈ A k, x ≤ N k) →
      (∀ k, IsSidon (A k : Set ℕ)) →
      Tendsto (fun k => ((A k).card : ℝ) / Real.sqrt (N k)) atTop (nhds 1) →
      ∀ i < m, Tendsto
        (fun k => (((A k + A k).filter (fun s => s % m = i)).card : ℝ) / ((A k + A k).card : ℝ))
        atTop (nhds (1 / m)) := by
